questions.question: Who was the star of the 2017 smash hit Wonder Woman?
What immersive technology hit mass appeal with the introduction of smartphones and techs, such as Google Cardboard?
Bruno Mars sang he didn't want the girl to change anything about herself. What was the name of the song?
In what United Arab Emirates city would you find the Burj Khalifa, the world's tallest building when opened in 2010?
"Left me on read" meant what?
questions.answer: When a person read a text but didn't respond
